summary: BUG FIX VERIFIED: Personalized Picks flow now shows only 1 message (confirmation) instead of 3. The intermediate 'Here are personalized picks curated just for Mojo!' message has been removed from the open_picks_vault handler at line 2227-2235 in MiraDemoPage.jsx.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ BUG FIX CORRECT: Line 2227-2235 now opens panel directly without adding intermediate message
✅ Comment added explaining NO intermediate message should be added
✅ Only the onSendSuccess callback (line 4113-4136) adds the confirmation message after user submits
✅ Test verified: User message + ONLY confirmation message = 2 messages total (was 3 before fix)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Personalized Picks bug fix verified. The flow now correctly shows: 1) User message 'Show me personalized picks for Mojo', 2) Panel opens WITHOUT adding any message, 3) After user selects items and confirms, ONLY the confirmation message appears: 'Your X personalized pick(s) for Mojo have been sent to your Concierge®!'

bug_fix_verification.bug_description: When users clicked personalized picks button, 3 messages appeared instead of 1 (user message + intermediate 'Here are personalized picks curated' + confirmation)
bug_fix_verification.fix_description: Removed setConversationHistory call that was adding intermediate message when panel opened

test_results.step_3_after_confirmation: User messages: 1, Intermediate messages: 0, Confirmation messages: 1

e2e_test_flow: 3. Panel opens - NO intermediate message added (✅ verified)
7. Chat shows ONLY confirmation message: '✨ Your 1 personalized pick for Mojo have been sent to your Concierge®!'
